questions.audioText: Woman: Excuse me, how much is this T-shirt? Man: It's fifteen dollars. Woman: And the blue one? Man: That one is twelve dollars. Woman: Great, I'll take the blue one.
questions.question: How much does the woman pay?

questions.audioText: Tom: What do you like to do on weekends? Sarah: I love going to the park with my dog. Sometimes I ride my bike or meet friends for coffee.
questions.question: What does Sarah enjoy doing on weekends?
options: Going to the park with her dog

questions.audioText: Announcer: The train to Boston will depart from platform three at four thirty. Please have your tickets ready.
questions.question: When does the train to Boston leave?

questions.audioText: Girl: Mom, can I have some ice cream? Mom: You can have one scoop after you finish your dinner. Girl: Okay, I'll eat quickly!
questions.question: When can the girl have ice cream?

questions.audioText: Librarian: The library opens at nine in the morning and closes at eight in the evening from Monday to Friday. On weekends, we close at five.
questions.question: What time does the library close on Saturdays?

questions.audioText: Mike: I'm looking for a new apartment. I need something near the university. Agent: There's a small studio on Park Street for six hundred dollars a month. Mike: That sounds good. Can I see it tomorrow?
questions.question: Why does Mike want an apartment near the university?

questions.audioText: Woman: I need to buy some eggs, milk, and bread. Man: The supermarket is just around the corner. It's open until ten tonight.
questions.question: Where is the woman going?

questions.audioText: Doctor: You should take this medicine twice a day, once in the morning and once in the evening. Patient: For how long? Doctor: For one week. Then come back to see me.
questions.question: How many times a day should the patient take the medicine?

questions.audioText: Anna: I'm going to the beach this Saturday. Do you want to come? Ben: I'd love to, but I have to work. Anna: Oh, that's too bad. Maybe next time.
questions.question: Why can't Ben go to the beach?

questions.audioText: Weather report: Good morning. Today will be sunny and warm, with a high of twenty-five degrees. Tonight, the temperature will drop to twelve degrees, so bring a jacket if you go out.
questions.question: What is the temperature tonight expected to be?
